geography.data_source: KMC ward map 2022, Jadavpur area zone boundary, university campus and surrounding wards

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Kolkata district tables (Jadavpur area wards), high literacy driven by Jadavpur University influence, stable population at 0.4% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) West Bengal urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, Jadavpur University area employment patterns, coaching/tutoring industry estimates

commute_profile.data_source: Kolkata Metro Railway Blue Line extended corridor data, CSTC bus route data for Jadavpur area

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from university zone — very high examination sensitivity, lowest collective action threshold (Jadavpur University has strongest student movement tradition in India), very high political mobilisation

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from university zone social dynamics — student peer networks, faculty networks, politically active student unions, cross-class interaction on campus

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Jadavpur University main gate vendor cluster, student footfall driven
Estimated from Jadavpur 8B bus stand area commercial cluster, major local transit hub
Estimated from Jadavpur area competitive exam coaching centres, WBPSC/banking exam preparation

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Examination Hub template for Jadavpur's university character — reduced exam_aspirant from 0.22 to 0.15 (more university students than competitive exam aspirants), increased formal_sector_employee for educated middle-class residential

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from KMC ward councillors, Jadavpur University administration, very active student union structure (JUTA/FETSU/SFI/TMCP), local media
